parameters.body: ={{ JSON.stringify({ source_id: $json.source_id, title: $json.title, url: $json.url, content_raw: $json.content_raw, author: $json.author, published_at: $json.published_at, tags: $json.tags, metadata: $json.metadata }) }}

_meta.description: Resolves source_slug → source_id then POSTs each item to /api/news.
